description_long: This is a small, white canvas sneaker designed for infants or toddlers, featuring a rounded toe and a soft, flexible structure. The shoe has a classic low-top silhouette with a stitched toe cap and a white lace-up closure, threaded through four metallic eyelets on each side. A circular patch with the text 'Bourchou' and a playful face logo is stitched onto the outer side, adding a distinctive branding detail. The sole is flat and appears to be made of a soft, brown rubber material, providing gentle traction suitable for young children. The interior is likely padded for comfort, and the overall construction is lightweight and easy to handle. The shoe's clean, bright appearance and minimal wear suggest it is either new or very lightly used.
description: A small, white canvas sneaker for infants or toddlers with a lace-up front, circular side logo, and soft brown rubber sole.
description_view_0: Side view showing the circular 'Bourchou' logo patch, lace eyelets, and the full profile of the shoe.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, laces tied in a bow, and the stitched toe cap.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the clean canvas surface, laces, and the shoe's low-top shape.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the heel tab, back seam, and a partial view of the 'Bourchou' branding on the heel.
attribute_logo: Circular patch with 'Bourchou' text and a face, located on the outer side of the shoe, in black on white background.
